stories.headline: Patel Likely Next Cabinet-Level Official to Go, White House Official Tells Playbook
stories.summary: A senior White House official tells Politico the FBI director's exit is "only a matter of time," with Trump fed up over the steady drumbeat of negative stories surrounding Kash Patel.

stories.headline: Pentagon Unveils Record $1.5 Trillion FY27 Budget — A 44% Increase
stories.summary: Acting DOD Comptroller Jay Hurst called it a "generational investment," but $350B of new funding hinges on a partyline reconciliation bill that's far from a sure thing in Congress.

stories.headline: Witkoff and Kushner Head to Pakistan to Restart Iran Negotiations
stories.summary: VP Vance is on standby as the White House signals "some progress from the Iranian side" — even as Sen. Wicker calls for Trump to scrap the ceasefire and restart the war.

stories.headline: Cherfilus-McCormick Resigns Ten Minutes Before Ethics Sanctions Hearing
stories.summary: The Florida Democrat — facing federal charges over diverted COVID-19 relief funds — stepped down minutes before the panel was set to recommend sanctions, instantly stripping it of jurisdiction.

stories.headline: DOJ Drops Federal Reserve Renovation Probe, Clearing Path for Warsh Confirmation
stories.summary: Sen. Thom Tillis is expected to lift his blockade of Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair after the administration moved its inquiry into the central bank's headquarters renovation to a different authority.

stories.headline: Shapiro Tests Political Muscle in Swing-State Midterms
stories.summary: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro is leveraging his political operation in the 2026 PA midterms — with a lot on the line for his presidential outlook.

stories.headline: Fitzpatrick Says He'd Leave the GOP "100%" If PA Had Open Primaries
stories.summary: On Punchbowl's Fly Out Day, Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick (R-Bucks) called the two-party system "inherently divisive" and said he'd register Independent if Pennsylvania let him.

stories.headline: NERC Sounds Alarm on Sudden Data Center Load Losses
stories.summary: The reliability watchdog flagged a series of "widespread and unexpected" customer-initiated load reductions in 2024–2025 — events where 1,000 MW or more dropped off the bulk power system.

stories.headline: DTE Proposes $474M Michigan Rate Hike
stories.summary: DTE Energy filed a $474M general rate case in Michigan amid mounting utility-side pressure from AI data center load planning.

stories.headline: U.S. Electricity Prices Rose 9% Year-Over-Year in February
stories.summary: EIA data shows February's residential electricity prices climbed 9% YoY — fresh evidence that load growth from data centers is starting to flow through to consumer bills.

stories.headline: Pirates 6, Brewers 0 — Skenes Nearly Perfect, Griffin Goes Yard on 20th Birthday
stories.summary: Paul Skenes (4-1) carried a perfect game into the seventh, finishing with 1 hit, 7 K, 0 BB over 7 shutout IP (93 pitches, 62 strikes); 20-year-old Konnor Griffin hit his first career HR and drove in 3 RBI, with additional run-scoring from Gonzales (4th), Cruz (5th force-out), and Horwitz (6th).
